About Me

Communication Trainer,
Career Coach & Test Prep Expert

Hi, I'm Allee Paul — a certified communication trainer and L&D consultant with over 12 years of experience helping individuals and organisations unlock their full potential through the power of language and connection.

My corporate practice covers soft skills, leadership communication, presentation skills, and workplace behavioural training for Fortune 500s, startups, and NGOs. On the academic side, I specialise in IELTS Academic and PTE Core coaching, with a track record of taking students from Band 5 to 8+ in under 12 weeks.

My philosophy: real transformation happens when learning feels human, contextual, and actionable — not like a lecture.

IELTS Expert Trainer PTE Certified Coach NLP Practitioner

IELTS & PTE

Score Higher.
Get There Faster.

Structured, expert coaching in all four skills — Reading, Writing, Listening, and Speaking — with real exam simulations and targeted feedback.

IELTS

Academic & General Training

For university admission & migration

✓

Reading & Writing Masterclass — Task 1, Task 2 templates, academic vocabulary, and skimming strategies.

✓

Speaking Lab — Cue card practice, fluency drills, pronunciation correction with recorded feedback.

✓

Listening Modules — Accent training, map-completion, MCQ, and note-completion tactics.

✓

12 Full Mock Tests — Timed, examiner-graded with detailed band descriptors.

🏆 Average Student Improvement: +1.5 Bands in 8 Weeks
PTE

PTE Academic & Core

For PR, study & professional visas

✓

Speak & Describe Strategy — Describe image, re-tell lecture, repeat sentence with AI-tracked accuracy scores.

✓

Write Essay & Summarize — Academic paragraph construction and summarise spoken text under exam conditions.

✓

Reading & Listening — Fill-in-the-blanks, highlight correct summary, select missing word techniques.

✓

Software Practice Portal — 24/7 access to our PTE mock portal simulating the real Pearson interface.

🏆 85% of Students Achieve 79+ Score (Target for PR)

Essentials

What Makes the Difference

The core principles and methodologies behind every session — corporate or language.

01
Needs Analysis First

Every engagement starts with a deep-dive into your team's specific gaps — no generic slides, no one-size-fits-all delivery.

02
Story-Driven Learning

Adults learn through experience. Real case studies, role-plays, and live scenarios drive retention far beyond lectures alone.

03
Measurable Outcomes

Post-training assessments, 30-day follow-ups, and custom KPIs ensure your investment translates to real workplace change.

04
Inclusive Design

Materials and delivery are designed to work across diverse teams — language levels, learning styles, and cultural backgrounds.

05
Blended Delivery

On-site workshops, live virtual sessions, and async microlearning modules combine to fit your team's workflow — not interrupt it.

06
Certified Facilitation

Backed by CELTA, ICF, and NLP certifications — every facilitated session meets global best-practice standards.

01
Diagnostic Assessment

A free 45-minute baseline test identifies your exact strengths and weak bands before your first class even starts.

02
Examiner-Trained Feedback

Written and spoken feedback uses the same descriptors examiners use — so you understand exactly where marks are lost.

03
Real Exam Simulations

Full timed mocks under exam conditions, weekly, so test day feels familiar — not terrifying.

04
Vocabulary & Grammar Focus

Targeted academic word lists, collocations, and grammar patterns for each task type — no filler content.

05
Speaking Confidence Lab

Weekly recorded speaking sessions with playback review — because fluency comes from hearing yourself improve.

06
Small Cohort Sizes

Groups capped at 8 students to ensure every person gets direct attention — not lost in a crowd.

Pricing & Plans

Invest in the Right Plan

Transparent pricing for individuals and organisations. No hidden fees — just results.

IELTS / PTE
Starter
₹8,999/month

Perfect for self-motivated learners who need structured guidance and resources.

  • 8 Live Online Classes (1hr each)
  • 2 Full Mock Tests with feedback
  • Study material & vocabulary pack
  • WhatsApp support group
  • Recorded session access (30 days)
Most Popular
IELTS / PTE
Intensive
₹15,999/month

Our most popular package — accelerated coaching for serious band-score targets.

  • 16 Live Online Classes (1hr each)
  • 5 Full Mock Tests with examiner feedback
  • 1-on-1 Speaking Assessment session
  • Writing task corrections (unlimited)
  • Priority WhatsApp support
  • Access until exam date
Corporate
Team Starter
₹45,000/session

Ideal for teams of up to 15. A focused half-day or full-day workshop on one topic area.

  • One modular workshop (4–8 hrs)
  • Customised to your team's needs
  • Workbook & digital resource kit
  • Post-training feedback report
  • Certificate of completion
Best Value
Corporate
L&D Programme
₹1,80,000/quarter

A full quarterly learning & development engagement — ideal for growing organisations.

  • Needs analysis + programme design
  • 6 custom training sessions
  • Up to 50 participants
  • Blended delivery (on-site + virtual)
  • Manager toolkit & coaching guide
  • Quarterly impact report
  • Ongoing email support
